lead: AI helps in three plain, everyday ways. First, it makes your work go faster. Second, it does the dull, repeat jobs for you. Third, it helps you think a problem all the way through. And here is the best part: in every one of these, you are still the boss. You decide what happens.
AI helps in three down-to-earth ways: it speeds your work up, it takes the boring jobs off your plate, and it helps you think things through. In every one, you stay in charge.
It comes down to three down-to-earth things: it speeds work up, takes the boring jobs, and helps you think things through. You stay in charge of all three.
Three down-to-earth ways: it speeds work up, takes the boring jobs, and helps you think things through — and you stay in charge of all three.
Three ways: faster work, boring jobs gone, clearer thinking. You stay in charge.
enduring-idea: The one idea to keep: AI does the hard work, but you still make the choice. It works the same way in all three.
The one idea to keep: AI takes the effort, and you keep the decision. That's the deal in all three.
The one idea to keep: AI takes the effort; you keep the call. That's the same deal in all three.
The one idea to keep: AI takes the effort; you keep the call — the same deal across all three.
Keep this: AI takes the effort; you keep the call. All three.
explorable-intro: Tap each one below. Watch the hard part get smaller — and see the bit that is still yours to do.

notice-shape: Look at the shape of it. The "With AI" bar is always shorter, but it never goes all the way down to nothing — and the bit that is left is always the part that is yours. AI carries the heavy work, and you keep the judgment about what is right. That is how AI helps you without taking over.

Notice the shape: the "With AI" bar is always shorter, but it never empties — and the part left over is always yours. AI carries the effort, and you keep the judgment. That's how it helps without taking over.

Notice the shape: the "With AI" bar is always shorter, but it's never empty — and the part that's left is always yours. AI carries the effort; you keep the judgment. That's how it helps without taking over.
Notice the shape: the "With AI" bar is always shorter, yet never empty — the remainder is always yours. AI carries the effort; you keep the judgment. Help, not takeover.
The "With AI" bar shrinks but never empties; the remainder is yours. Effort to AI, judgment to you — help, not takeover.
